final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand color palette and typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: needs a refined, poetic East-Asian brand identity aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a structured brand spec sheet layout showing primary colors, secondary/accent colors, and typography specimens in clear labeled sections
Subject: must include:
  Brand name: 染秋 (RAN QIU)
  Primary color palette: inspired by 桂花 / 柿子 / 枫叶 / 乌龙茶 — warm autumnal earth tones
  Secondary/accent palette: inspired by 肉桂 / 檀香 / 琥珀 — deep, warm spice and resin tones
  Typography specimens: Chinese and Latin typefaces suited to the brand's poetic, Eastern sensibility
  Core fragrance series names for reference context: 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Scene/backdrop: needs a quiet, minimal backdrop evoking autumn atmosphere — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative mood evoking 秋日流转 — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: must be anchored in autumn seasonal tones — 桂花 gold, 柿子 orange, 枫叶 red, 乌龙茶 brown as primaries; 琥珀 amber, 檀香 beige, deep ink tones as secondaries — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a surface quality evoking traditional 染 (dyeing) craft — exact texture treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" and "RAN QIU"; must include section labels for 主色 / 辅色 / 字体规范
Constraints: must preserve the brand's dual identity — Chinese name 染秋 and Latin romanization RAN QIU both visible; color swatches must be clearly labeled with color names or values; typography section must show at least one Chinese typeface specimen and one Latin typeface specimen
Avoid: overly Western minimalism that erases Eastern character; generic tech-brand color palettes; cold or desaturated tones
